article_id: 1. All persons shall be equal before the law.

article_id: 1. The dignity of all persons shall be inviolable.

text_snippet: 3. For the purposes of this Article, the expression "forced labour" shall not include: any labour required in consequence of a sentence or order of a Court; any labour required of persons while lawful
